meta_description: IIT Bombay is one of India's premier technical universities. It received UNESCO funds from the Soviet Union and was designated an 'Institute of National Importance' by Parliament in 1961.
text_content: Announcements e-Postgraduate Diploma in Interaction Design (ePGD IxD) IDC School of Design Attn. JAM 2026 Registered Candidates THE LAST DATE FOR CLOSING REGISTRATION OF JAM 2026 APPLICATIONS HAS BEEN EXTENDED TILL 23.59.59 HOURS, MONDAY, OCTOBER 20, 2025. Applications are invited for Undergraduate Common Entrance Exam for Design (UCEED) for admission to B.Des at several IITs, Design Schools and result sharing Institutes. Applications are invited for Common Entrance Exam for Design (CEED) for admission to M.Des & PhD Programmes at several IITs, Design Schools and result sharing Institutes.
